lessons.name: Unit 9: Natural Disasters
lessons.description: Learn about natural disasters with past continuous tense.

sections.heading: 1. Từ vựng (Vocabulary)
sections.content:
Natural disasters: earthquake, tsunami, flood, drought, storm, typhoon, hurricane, tornado, volcanic eruption, landslide, avalanche, wildfire

Actions: evacuate, rescue, damage, destroy, collapse, warn, predict, prepare, survive, recover

Effects: victim, casualty, injury, death, homeless, damage, destruction, loss

sections.heading: 2. Luyện tập từ vựng (Vocabulary Practice)
sections.content:
Disaster-related expressions:

  • natural disaster: thiên tai
  • emergency kit: bộ dụng cụ khẩn cấp
  • warning system: hệ thống cảnh báo
  • rescue team: đội cứu hộ
  • take shelter: trú ẩn

sections.heading: 3. Ngữ âm (Pronunciation)
sections.content:
Stress in words ending in -logy and -graphy

Nhấn trước -logy/-graphy:

  • tech'nology /tekˈnɒlədʒi/
  • ge'ography /dʒiˈɒɡrəfi/

sections.heading: 4. Ngữ pháp (Grammar)
sections.content:
Past Continuous Tense (Thì quá khứ tiếp diễn)

A. Cấu trúc:

  • Khẳng định: S + was/were + V-ing
  • Ex: I was sleeping when the earthquake happened.
  • Phủ định: S + wasn't/weren't + V-ing
  • Ex: She wasn't watching TV.
  • Nghi vấn: Was/Were + S + V-ing?
  • Ex: Were you studying?

B. Cách dùng:

  • 1. Hành động đang xảy ra tại 1 thời điểm quá khứ:
  • Ex: At 8 p.m. yesterday, I was watching TV.
  • 2. Hành động đang xảy ra thì có hành động khác xen vào:
  • Ex: I was sleeping when the phone rang.
  • (Past continuous + when + past simple)
  • 3. Hai hành động đang xảy ra song song:
  • Ex: While I was studying, she was cooking.
  • (While + past continuous, past continuous)

C. Dấu hiệu nhận biết:

  • at + thời gian + yesterday/last...
  • at this time yesterday
  • when, while

D. Past Continuous vs Past Simple:

  • Past Continuous: hành động đang xảy ra (dài)
  • Past Simple: hành động xen vào (ngắn)
  • Ex: I was walking (dài) when it started to rain (ngắn).

sections.heading: 5-12. Các phần còn lại
sections.content: Getting Started, A Closer Look 1-2, Communication, Skills 1-2, Looking Back, Project

examples.question: I ______ (sleep) at 8 p.m. yesterday.
examples.explanation: Hành động đang xảy ra tại thời điểm quá khứ

problemTypes.name: Dạng 2: When + Past Simple
problemTypes.method: Phương pháp: Past continuous + when + past simple

examples.question: I ______ (sleep) when the earthquake ______ (happen).
examples.explanation: Hành động đang xảy ra + hành động xen vào

problemTypes.name: Dạng 3: While + Past Continuous
problemTypes.method: Phương pháp: While + past continuous, past continuous

examples.question: While I ______ (study), she ______ (cook).
examples.explanation: Hai hành động đang xảy ra song song

exercises.question: I ______ at 8 p.m. yesterday.
exercises.explanation: Thời điểm quá khứ → past continuous

exercises.question: I was sleeping when the earthquake ______.
exercises.explanation: Hành động xen vào → past simple

exercises.question: They ______ TV when the storm started.
exercises.explanation: Hành động đang xảy ra → past continuous

exercises.question: She ______ when I called.
exercises.explanation: Hành động đang xảy ra → past continuous

exercises.question: I ______ my homework when the lights went out.
exercises.explanation: Hành động đang xảy ra → past continuous

exercises.question: They ______ when the tsunami hit.
exercises.explanation: Hành động đang xảy ra → past continuous
